title: microstylis monophyllos
intro: Microstylis monophyllos, also known as the one-leaved orchid or one-leafed orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Microstylis monophyllos are attributed to its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or added to soups, or made into a tincture for its medicinal properties.
